title: Fluffy Roasted Canadian Egg White Roast
description: A light and winey Canadian dish featuring egg white and roast, perfect for a hangover cure, wrapped in a pandan leaf for added flavor and aroma.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the egg whites, olive oil, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper until stiff peaks form.
Season the beef roast with salt and black pepper.
Place the beef roast in the center of each pandan leaf, leaving a 1-inch border around the roast.
Spoon the egg white mixture over the beef roast, making sure to cover it evenly.
Fold the pandan leaves over the filling to form a tight package, and secure with kitchen twine if needed.
Place the packages on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, and roast in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
Remove the packages from the oven, and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
